problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
